[Question]
What could be the possible causes of toothache?

%;">Possible Causes of Toothache:

There are several potential causes for toothache, including:

  • Tooth Decay: Cavities can cause pain when they reach the pulp of the tooth.
  • Gum Disease: Inflammation or infection of the gums can lead to discomfort.
  • Tooth Fracture: Cracks or chips in the teeth can result in sensitivity and pain.
  • Dental Abscess: An abscess at the root of the tooth or between the tooth and gum can cause severe pain.
  • Tmj Disorder: Issues with the temporomandibular joint can sometimes manifest as toothache.
  • Grinding Teeth: Bruxism, or grinding your teeth, can wear down enamel and cause pain.
